MINI MINUTES: Assigned to Department 210 for prove-up. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: June Leathley. Arnold W. Evje appears for plaintiff. Ritesh Patel is sworn and examined for the plaintiff. Plaintiff's Exhibit 1, 3-day notice, marked for identification and admitted in evidence. The court grants judgment for the plaintiff. Judgment signed and filed this date.
